_README: Canonical embedding freeze record for the headline backbone (build doc §5/§15). FROZEN at C2 (2026-06-29): CONFIG fields below are pinned to the actually-loaded weights (verified via embed.load_backbone). CACHE-CONTENT fields are null and STAGE TO C3, when embed.build_cache runs the one-time pass over the ~175k disjoint-corpus items (a multi-hour CPU batch; the pass reveals NO compatibility number, so deferring the cache hashes does not touch the freeze's blindness). C3 CONTRACT: before build_cache overwrites this file it MUST verify the C2-frozen config fields (revision_sha / preprocess_hash / embedding_dim / dtype / normalization) equal these values and fail loud on a mismatch. Ablation backbones get their own embedding_manifest_<key>.json at C3 (non-canonical).

_freeze._overwrite_contract: C3 build_cache MUST verify the c2_verified_config_fields equal the freshly resolved values and fail loud on a mismatch before writing cache blobs, then MERGE the regenerated cache fields onto this committed dict so the c2_recorded_fields + _README + _freeze survive. Null c3_staged_cache_fields may be populated once; once non-null, a later run must reproduce them exactly and fail loud on drift before writing cache blobs unless an explicit re-freeze path is added. 'device' is RECORDED not verified — a faster mps/cuda one-time pass is allowed (build doc §5); kernels can differ, so it is logged, not frozen.

preprocess_transform: Resize(224, bicubic, antialias) -> ConvertMode(RGB) -> ToTensor -> Normalize(0.5,0.5,0.5)

image_source.note: per-item_id resolution asserted at embed time; fail loud on a miss (build doc §2)
